deleteConfirmation: Do you want to delete this notification?
duplicateConfirmation: Do you want to duplicate this notification?
restoreTitle: Select the notifications you want to restore
chooseSaveLocation: Choose where to save the file:
copyLineCodeText: Copy the following lines of code and paste them in the last line before closing the "head" element
payAttentionText: *Pay attention. Notifications will only work on sites with an SSL certificate

implementDialog.startSendingOutMessage: In order to start sending out Push Notifications to your clients, you must first implement the script below so visitors to your site can receive notifications.
implementDialog.dontShowThisMessage: Do not show me this message again

createContentText: Image, icon and button are optional, but recommended for optional results
whenToSend: When would you like to send?
immediateDescription: Right after you click ''send'' in the Summary screen

tooltip.testSend: Please note that tests sends for Push Notifications are sent to creator of the notification only.
tooltip.redirectUrl: This is the link your customers will be referred to when clicking on your notification.
tooltip.firefoxNotSupported: Note! Firefox does not support images for Push Notifications. Recipients using Firefox will see only title, text, icon.
tooltip.showRedirectButton: Add a button to your notification and lead your customers directly to your site

leaveCampaignCreationText: Would you like to save your changes before exiting?
assigningRecipientsToGroupMessage: Assigning recipients to a group is done by sending a specific link to the recipients you would like to have in your group. This is done by creating a group name and then adding it to your URL. For example, if your URL is
thenYouWillAdd: then you will add at the end ?g= and then the name of the group you are creating. The final result will look as follows:
onceYouHaveCreatedTheUrl: Once you have created this URL, send it to the desired recipients for this group, and once they have agreed to receive notifications, they will be assigned to the specified group.
arrivedTootltip: The number of Notifications that arrived to your recipients' browsers
